creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 215977
patch to update the port

- Update 1.28 --> 1.32
- respect move of upstream to GH
Changes: https://github.com/mrscotty/connector/compare/1.28...1.32
- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- Tested with:
	12.1-RELEASE-p6 amd64
	poudriere 3.3.4
	perl 5.30.3
	pkg 1.14.4
	openssl 1.1.1d
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
